title: Scourge Enchantment
description: Damage Enchantment that affects abnormal mobs including Creepers, Blazes, Slimes, and more...
body:
## Adds a new Damage Enchantment
Works like Smite or Bane of Arthropods except it affects a whole different array of mobs.

Can be obtained like any other regular enchantment. Enchantment table, Villager trades, Loot chests etc.
<details>
<summary>Affected Mobs</summary>
  
Creepers

Blazes

Slimes

Magma Cubes

Shulkers

</details>

Entities can be added through the usage of a datapack by adding entities to data/scourge/tags/entity_types/sensitive_to_scourge.json. (ONLY IN THE 1.20.5 VERSION)
